mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_alarm (device_id, alarm_type, severity, content, status, related_id, alarm_source, create_time) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{alarmType}, #{severity}, #{content}, #{status}, #{relatedId}, #{alarmSource}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM iot_alarm WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM iot_alarm WHERE alarm_source = #{alarmSource} AND related_id = #{relatedId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM iot_alarm ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM iot_alarm WHERE alarm_type = #{alarmType} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM iot_alarm WHERE alarm_source = #{alarmSource} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE iot_alarm SET status = #{status} WHERE alarm_id = #{alarmId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM iot_alarm WHERE severity >= 2 AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM iot_alarm WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM iot_alarm WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT a.* FROM iot_alarm a JOIN iot_device_user du ON a.device_id = du.device_id WHERE du.user_id = #{userId} UNION SELECT * FROM iot_alarm WHERE alarm_source = 'stock' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
